DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF NICOLE VETZMADIAN'S MOTION TO QUASH IS DENIED. SEE WRITTEN ORDER.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VETZMADIAN, NICOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, ANTONIO R. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD FILED BY ARBTITRATOR, DATED APR-20-2012.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-15-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THOMAS J. FEENEY VIA COURTCALL, MACMORRIS & CARBONE, TEL. 510.267.7200, FOR DEFENDANT AND OPPOSING PARTY ANTONIO GARCIA.
NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY NICOLE VETZMADIAN.

The Pro Tem Judge ADOPTED HIS tentative ruling: Plaintiff Nicole Vetzmadian's motion to quash is denied. SEE WRITTEN ORDER.
